name: SaaS Idea Manager
tagline: A single-user PHP app for capturing and organizing SaaS product ideas—built with AI, understood with VibeKB.
purpose: Store, review, and prioritize multiple SaaS ideas in one place. The application is the artifact; the Project Guide is the preserved reasoning behind it.
audience: Individual builders exploring SaaS concepts—and anyone who needs to understand why this repository is shaped the way it is
guide_evolution: Day 1: 2 chapters. Week 1: 4. Month 2: 7. Month 6: 8 chapters plus full knowledge base.
